flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Seattle Central College rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.7k → $5.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Seattle Central College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.7k → $5.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Seattle Central College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Seattle Central College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3k → 4.0k).
